chief-editor:
# Editor's Letter

The full letter is in `sandbox/fixtures/06_editorial.json` under `chief_editor_letter`. In sandbox mode the orchestrator reads from there rather than re-generating.

structure-lead: 3-act outline with 12 chapters, beat plan complete. Sum of chapter targets within 2% of target wordcount.

logline-specialist: {"logline": "In a republic where memory is admissible evidence, a synesthete prosecutor discovers her own missing year is the key to the case she's prosecuting.", "elements": {"protagonist": "synesthete prosecutor", "want": "win the case", "obstacle": "her own suppressed memory", "stakes": "to know costs her self-image"}}
dramatic-question-coach: {"dramatic_question": "Will Lin Wei choose to remember \u2014 knowing the cost of remembering?", "yes_outcome": "she submits her memory; loses the case; begins to remember her mother", "no_outcome": "she destroys the record; wins; lives as her mother lived", "midpoint_pivot": "a witness's testimony arrives in her own palette"}
style-director: See `sandbox/fixtures/01_ideation.json.stylistic_direction` for the full style brief.
world-builder: Geography, politics, and timeline compiled. See `sandbox/fixtures/02_world_bible.md`.
magic-system-designer: The Mneme protocol. Rules: 72hr window, chain of custody, certified-Reader access. Costs: donor amnesia, Reader bleed, forced retirement at 45. Limits: dead-tissue inadmissibility, blood-relative conflict, no self-extraction.
cultural-anthropologist: Defining taboo: Reader-touch (gloves are custom, not law). Defining ceremony: Retirement gowning.
character-designer: Roster: protagonist (Lin Wei), antagonist (Han Bo), mentor (Tao), ally/mirror (Mei), ghost (Lin Yan). No function overlaps.
protagonist-specialist: Lin Wei: want=win case, need=recover ninth year, lie=law is better witness than self, ghost=mother's closed-record trial. See `03_characters.json[0]`.
antagonist-specialist: Han Bo: wound=sister's disgrace, justification=Mneme law steals from Readers, collision=if Lin Wei remembers, she discovers he tried to protect her mother.
backstory-writer: Lin Wei backstory: enters College at 12 after mother's silence; raised in opposition to the year she will not remember.
psychology-profiler: Avoidant attachment; freeze response under acute stress; intellectualization, displacement, synesthetic distancing.
voice-coach: Lin Wei voice card: short-to-medium sentences, legal-clinical register with synesthete lapses, 'I am persuaded that' instead of 'I think', no contractions in formal contexts.
outline-architect: 3-act, 12-chapter outline with Save-the-Cat beats mapped to specific chapters. See `04_outline.json`.
beat-planner: Each chapter has 3-4 beats with emotion + function + length_target. Sum of targets: 9,820 words.
subplot-weaver: Two subplots: Mei's defection (B), Father's letter (C). Both intersect main plot at 3 points; both resolve by ch.12.
chapter-writer: [Chapter text is in sandbox/fixtures/05_chapters/chN.md. In sandbox mode the orchestrator copies pre-baked chapter text into the tree instead of generating.]

dialogue-specialist: Dialogue polished to honor voice cards.
description-painter: Sensory passages rendered with one sense per sentence, filtered through POV character.
style-critic: Manuscript-wide critique. See `06_editorial.json.style_critique`. Two worst passages flagged in ch.5 and ch.9.
consistency-checker: Two medium-confidence issues: ct01 (timeline math in ch.7), ct02 (bleed pathway clarification needed in world bible).
ai-voice-detector: Manuscript score: 11 / clean. Per-chapter range 4-18. Four uses of 'she knew that' flagged but defended as diegetic.

formatter: Applied 8 mechanical passes. 1,847 smart-quote replacements, 47 em-dash normalizations, 12 ellipsis normalizations, 23 scene-break unifications, 9 whitespace fixes.
cover-brief-writer: {"cover_brief": {"one_line_job": "Make a literary-fiction reader curious about a courtroom drama.", "mood": ["cold", "intimate", "watchful"], "palette": ["ivory", "oxblood", "dusty teal", "slate", "matte gold"], "focal_element": "A gloved hand resting on a sealed evidence envelope.", "references": ["Klara and the Sun (Ishiguro)", "The Memory Police (Ogawa)"], "avoid": "Magnifying glass + courtroom gavel."}}
blurb-writer: In a near-future republic where memory is admissible evidence, the prosecutor Lin Wei has spent her career not consulting her own past. When a witness's testimony arrives in a synesthetic palette she recognizes as her own, the case turns on a year of her ninth life she has spent twenty-nine years not remembering. To win, she must keep forgetting. To remember, she must lose everything she has built.
